transcript: Come on, let me do my impression. That's the face right there. I'm leaving for my 5 a.m. workout. You do it! You know, I'm gonna come home, take a two-hour nap. You did it! You know, go back to the gym at like 5 p.m. And then have some ice cream and go to sleep. We always gotta scream and stretch. Nah, why you be doing that a hicks man

timestamps.text: Come on, let me do my impression.
I'm leaving for my 5 a.m. workout.
You know, I'm gonna come home, take a two-hour nap.
You know, go back to the gym at like 5 p.m.
And then have some ice cream and go to sleep.
We always gotta scream and stretch.
Nah, why you be doing that a hicks man
